evidence_notes: Vessel repeatedly dark near Karimata Strait during peak tanker season. AIS gaps 6–18h coincide with known STS coordinates. Cargo declared as 'general cargo' but draft readings suggest crude.

STS candidate detected x4 in 90 days at 1.1°N 103.7°E. Vessel name changed from OCEAN STAR to PROSPERITY. No confirmed cargo declaration.
Loitering 18h+ near East Johor Strait on two occasions. Owner listed as same address as three OFAC-proximate entities.
Draft inconsistency at Singapore anchorage suggests illicit bunkering. Vessel operates under P&I cover withdrawn for sanctions exposure.
Position jump 3.2nm in 12 min near Pedra Branca — transponder manipulation suspected. Subsequent routing to Dumai without port call.
One AIS gap >8h near Karimata. Vessel linked through manager to a probable entity. Insufficient corroboration.
Flag from Mongolia (land-locked) — classic flag-of-convenience anomaly. No other strong indicators yet.
Multiple AIS gaps but vessel is a legitimate bunker supplier with Port Authority records. Needs secondary verification.
Owner linked two degrees from OFAC-proximate entity via nominee director. Distance may reflect coincidental corporate structure.
Single AIS gap 7h. Vessel currently under Singapore MPA inspection — gap may be legitimate.
Cargo mismatch flagged but charterer has provided documentation. Under review.
Vessel operates Singapore coastal ferry route. AIS gaps explained by port layover schedule. Cleared after MPA verification.
Registered with verified major shipping company. Corporate ownership fully transparent. No evasion indicators.

Ship-to-ship transfer detected at 26.5°N 56.2°E — outside declared anchorage. Cargo: suspected crude. Draft delta 2.8m post-transfer.

Single STS candidate event. Limited corroboration; included as early indicator.
Linked through two corporate hops to an Iran-adjacent entity. Chain length reduces confidence.
MMSI prefix 422 (Iran) with AIS records showing port Kharg Island. Cargo marked LPG but draft profile inconsistent.
Direct relation to OFAC-designated entity via shared registered agent. Three dark transits Gulf of Oman.
